product_results.title: JETech Magnetic Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch with Camera Control Capture Button, Compatible with MagSafe, Translucent Matte Back Slim Shockproof Phone Cover (Black Titanium)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be a good quality product that fits perfectly. The case demonstrates solid durability, surviving drops without issues. Users appreciate the excellent protection it provides against accidental drops. The sleek design features a clear back that shows off the phone's design. The magnetic case functions well, though customers have mixed experiences with camera button sensitivity and are disappointed with the grip.

authors_reviews.title: JETech Magnetic Case Review
authors_reviews.text: The JETech magnetic case for iPhone 16 Pro continues the consistency I have come to expect from this brand. I have used JETech Mag cases on nearly every phone I have owned since the iPhone X, and they have always been reliable. Even my family uses these cases because of their fit, protection, and dependable MagSafe compatibility. Build quality is solid, the magnets hold well, and the case does not add unnecessary bulk. Overall, it remains a trustworthy choice based on years of consistent use.
authors_reviews.author: Anthony

authors_reviews.title: Highly recommended
authors_reviews.text: Really good case for my phone highly recommended
authors_reviews.author: Marc climacusa

authors_reviews.title: Overall, close to perfect
authors_reviews.text: Perfect fit, vert strong MagSafe attachment for card wallet and the right combination (for me) of protection and light weight. If you need a waterproof case or covering over the screen or camera lenses on the back, look elsewhere. But remember that type of case will be bigger, and more awkward. This one is perfect - and very reasonably priced - for my uses.
authors_reviews.author: Nancy Lewis

authors_reviews.title: Nice one but magnet is not what I’ve expected
authors_reviews.text: The case feels good and sturdy. However, I’ve seen images indicating that the built in magnet attracts strong to one on those phone-holder magnets for cars and that’s a complete lie. You will need to glue on an extra magnet to your case for that.
authors_reviews.author: Alejandro Pereira

authors_reviews.title: Qualité irréprochable
authors_reviews.text: J’adore les produits JETech.Cet etuie est très résistante et elle protège parfaitement. Elle est d’excellente qualité. Le fini est très élégant et le magnétisme est fort
authors_reviews.author: JONATHAN
